module.name: references
module.description: Bibliography from raw BibTeX. Independent knobs: layout (list|cards), notation (ieee|apa), marker (number|key|bullet|none), and a custom/omittable header. Handles any entry type with type-aware formatting (place: publisher, In ... for chapters/proceedings, thesis/report types), @string macros, # concatenation, crossref/xdata inheritance, biblatex fields, LaTeX accents and $math$.

param.name: title
param.label: Header
param.desc: Header text; empty or 'none' hides it

snippet.label: References (numbered list, IEEE)
snippet.text:
<!-- @references layout: list, notation: ieee, marker: number -->
@article{einstein1905,
  author = {Einstein, Albert},
  title = {On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies},
  journal = {Annalen der Physik},
  volume = {17}, number = {10}, pages = {891--921}, year = {1905}
}
@book{knuth1997,
  author = {Knuth, Donald E.},
  title = {The Art of Computer Programming},
  address = {Reading, MA}, publisher = {Addison-Wesley}, year = {1997}
}
<!-- @end -->
snippet.description: layout: list|cards · notation: ieee|apa · marker: number|key|bullet|none · title: text (empty/none hides it).

snippet.label: References (cards, no header)
snippet.text:
<!-- @references layout: cards, notation: apa, marker: none, title: none -->
@inproceedings{vaswani2017,
  author = {Vaswani, Ashish and Shazeer, Noam and Parmar, Niki},
  title = {Attention Is All You Need},
  booktitle = {Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems},
  address = {Long Beach, CA}, year = {2017}, pages = {5998--6008}
}
<!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Card layout, APA notation, no markers, header hidden.

snippet.label: References (cite-key tags)
snippet.text:
<!-- @references layout: list, marker: key, title: Bibliography -->
@book{knuth1997,
  author = {Knuth, Donald E.}, title = {The Art of Computer Programming},
  address = {Reading, MA}, publisher = {Addison-Wesley}, year = {1997}
}
<!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Uses the BibTeX cite key as the marker, e.g. [knuth1997].
